content.main_text_preview: Important Alerts | Screen Reader | Skip to Main Content | A- A A+ Institute Portal MIS Login Web Mail Contact Us Student Portal (old) SHRI GOVINDRAM SEKSARIA INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY & SCIENCE, INDORE 'NAAC A GRADE' , An Autonomous Institute, established in 1952, run by Govt. of Madhya Pradesh Affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal & Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Indore Home Innovation & Startups IIC Functionaries About IIC IIC Achievements IIC Activities IIC Functionaries IIC Objectives and Outcomes IIC Resources IIC Vision and Mission IIC Functionaries Functionaries: Although the outcomes reflect IIC’s efficient functioning, achievement of these are subject to the individual entities (such as departments, clubs CIDI and other disciplinary cells of the institution). The IIC functionaries intervene in these activities through these entities only. So, the functionaries described as blow are meant to orient, monitor and coordinate for the achievement of outcomes.
